tuning_key.text: Off in the distance what could it be? / Wonders as far as the eye can see / Freedom, happiness, beauty, and love / Phantoms, of what could be to come
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: Trust is not a destination, but the landscape between what is known and what is possible. Every moment carries a horizon of potential that exists beyond our current perception, waiting to be recognized. The mirage is not an illusion—it is a living invitation, a vibration of becoming that resonates through every cell of experience.

practice.title: Breath of Horizon
practice.instruction: Inhale deeply and imagine your breath expanding beyond the physical boundaries of your body, touching the edges of uncertainty with gentle curiosity.

practice.title: Open Pulse
practice.instruction: Place your hand on your chest and feel the rhythm of your heartbeat, acknowledging it as a constant signal of trust moving through your living system.

practice.title: Resonance Drop
practice.instruction: Close your eyes and listen for the echo audio, allowing the frequency of raw trust to calibrate your internal landscape without needing to understand or control its movement.
